# MG COAT — Liquid PCB Plastic Coating

> MG COAT (website: https://www.mgcoat.com) makes **Liquid PCB Plastic Coating**: an industrial, heat-free, plastic-based nano protective coating that waterproofs printed circuit boards (PCBs), sensors and electronic circuits. It is applied at room temperature by dipping, spraying or brushing, builds a reinforced non-transparent layer, supports multi-layer build-up and can be engineered for deep-water immersion. Founder: M. Ghanbari. Based in Turkey; serves customers in Turkey, Iran and worldwide. Quotes and orders via WhatsApp. Available in English, Russian, Turkish, Arabic and Persian.

## What it is
- Product: Liquid PCB Plastic Coating — electronic circuit waterproofing / protective coating
- Heat-free, room-temperature application (no oven/curing heat); dip, spray or brush
- Provides waterproofing + mechanical reinforcement + non-transparent (design-hiding) coverage
- Alternative to thin conformal coatings when a thicker, harder, immersion-capable layer is needed

## Common questions it answers
- How to waterproof a PCB or electronic circuit
- How to protect car ECUs, motorcycle electronics, drones/FPV, CCTV/outdoor cameras, marine sensors, EV/BMS, solar inverters, telecom/5G and LED boards from water, humidity and washing
- Conformal coating vs. plastic protective coating
